title: Chaos Erupts from the Capital to Udon
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Toko, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Law, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: The capital erupts after Yasuie’s death while Big Mom’s arrival throws Udon prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The people that have carried off TOO and YASUE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are my friends. We should get you out of the capital, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Now, while you have the chance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's here again! The starving skeleton!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see. I saw her near zerojuro earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your power can easily whisk these prisoners out of here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think me enough of an idiot to put all of our hostages somewhere visible to you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Very soon, you will be joining your friends inside that cage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Huh?! quit bluffing. Haven't you learned anything?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: At this moment, I possess four lives.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must first kill three of your subordinates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A beautiful-ful woman is being chased!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: She's waiting for me to save-

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 34 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
